metadata.name: holging
metadata.description: Holging — Tokenized Hedge Protocol on Solana

accounts.name: new_authority
docs: Должен совпадать с pool_state.pending_authority

accounts.name: price_update
docs: Oracle price — для расчёта freed_usdc и распределения LP fees

accounts.name: lp_mint
docs: LP token mint (PDA, создан через initialize_lp)

accounts.name: lp_position
docs: Позиция LP провайдера — создаётся при первом депозите

accounts.name: lp_provider_lp_ata
docs: ATA LP провайдера для LP токенов — создаётся если не существует

accounts.name: lp_position
docs: Позиция LP провайдера

accounts.name: lp_provider_usdc
docs: Куда перевести USDC fees

accounts.name: pool_state
docs: Не используем Account<PoolState> т.к. аккаунт может быть старого размера.

accounts.name: user_shortsol
docs: User's shortSOL associated token account.
Must be created before calling mint (or use create_idempotent on client).

accounts.name: funding_config
docs: Опциональный FundingConfig — если передан, фандинг применяется инлайн
перед вычислением shortsol_price. Если не передан, k остаётся текущим.

accounts.name: funding_config
docs: Опциональный FundingConfig — если передан, фандинг применяется инлайн
перед вычислением shortsol_price. Если не передан, k остаётся текущим.

accounts.name: lp_mint
docs: LP token mint (PDA)

accounts.name: lp_position
docs: Позиция LP провайдера (PDA seeds: lp_position + pool + lp_provider)

accounts.name: lp_provider_lp_ata
docs: ATA LP провайдера с LP токенами (для burn)

accounts.name: lp_provider_usdc
docs: Куда вернуть USDC

accounts.name: price_update
docs: Для проверки здоровья vault после вывода

accounts.name: pyth_price
docs: Pyth PriceUpdateV2 account (ephemeral, created per-transaction).
Feed ID is validated inside `get_validated_price_no_deviation`.

errors.name: CirculatingNotZero
errors.msg: Cannot update k with tokens in circulation

errors.name: NoPendingAuthority
errors.msg: No pending authority — call transfer_authority first

errors.name: LpNotInitialized
errors.msg: LP system not initialized — call initialize_lp first

fields.name: rate_bps
docs: Funding rate in basis points per day (e.g. 10 = 0.10%/day)

fields.name: last_funding_at
docs: Unix timestamp of last accrual

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump

types.name: LpPosition
docs: Позиция LP провайдера в конкретном пуле.
PDA seeds: ["lp_position", pool_state, owner]

fields.name: owner
docs: Владелец позиции

fields.name: pool
docs: Пул к которому привязана позиция

fields.name: lp_shares
docs: Количество LP токенов у данного провайдера

fields.name: fee_per_share_checkpoint
docs: Снимок fee_per_share_accumulated на момент последнего settle

fields.name: pending_fees
docs: Начисленные но ещё не claimed USDC fees

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump

fields.name: authority
docs: Admin authority

fields.name: k
docs: Normalizing constant k = P0^2 / PRICE_PRECISION, stored scaled by PRICE_PRECISION

fields.name: fee_bps
docs: Fee in basis points (4 = 0.04%)

fields.name: total_minted
docs: Total shortSOL ever minted (in token base units, 1e9)

fields.name: total_redeemed
docs: Total shortSOL ever redeemed

fields.name: circulating
docs: Current shortSOL in circulation

fields.name: total_fees_collected
docs: Cumulative fees collected (USDC, 1e6 precision)

fields.name: vault_balance
docs: Current USDC balance in vault (1e6 precision)

fields.name: pyth_feed
docs: Pyth SOL/USD price feed account

fields.name: shortsol_mint
docs: shortSOL SPL token mint address

fields.name: paused
docs: Emergency pause flag

fields.name: last_oracle_price
docs: Cached last oracle price (scaled 1e9)

fields.name: last_oracle_timestamp
docs: Cached last oracle timestamp

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed

fields.name: mint_auth_bump
docs: Mint authority bump seed

fields.name: pending_authority
docs: Pending authority for two-step transfer (default = нет pending)

fields.name: pyth_feed_id
docs: Pyth price feed ID as UTF-8 hex bytes (64 chars = [u8; 64])

fields.name: lp_mint
docs: LP token SPL mint PDA (["lp_mint", pool_state])

fields.name: lp_total_supply
docs: Зеркало lp_mint.supply — синхронизируется через reload после mint/burn

fields.name: fee_per_share_accumulated
docs: Глобальный аккумулятор fees per LP share (scaled × SHARE_PRECISION = 1e12)
Растёт при каждом mint/redeem/accrue_funding

fields.name: lp_principal
docs: Сумма USDC внесённая LP провайдерами (principal, без накопленных fees)

fields.name: min_lp_deposit
docs: Минимальный депозит LP в USDC base units

fields.name: total_lp_fees_pending
docs: Суммарные pending fees всех LP (для защиты admin withdraw_fees)

fields.name: feed_id
docs: `FeedId` but avoid the type alias because of compatibility issues with Anchor's `idl-build` feature.

fields.name: publish_time
docs: The timestamp of this price update in seconds

fields.name: prev_publish_time
docs: The timestamp of the previous price update. This field is intended to allow users to
identify the single unique price update for any moment in time:
for any time t, the unique update is the one such that prev_publish_time < t <= publish_time.
Note that there may not be such an update while we are migrating to the new message-sending logic,
as some price updates on pythnet may not be sent to other chains (because the message-sending
logic may not have triggered). We can solve this problem by making the message-sending mandatory
(which we can do once publishers have migrated over).
Additionally, this field may be equal to publish_time if the message is sent on a slot where
where the aggregation was unsuccesful. This problem will go away once all publishers have
migrated over to a recent version of pyth-agent.

types.name: PriceUpdateV2
docs: A price update account. This account is used by the Pyth Receiver program to store a verified price update from a Pyth price feed.
It contains:
- `write_authority`: The write authority for this account. This authority can close this account to reclaim rent or update the account to contain a different price update.
- `verification_level`: The [`VerificationLevel`] of this price update. This represents how many Wormhole guardian signatures have been verified for this price update.
- `price_message`: The actual price update.
- `posted_slot`: The slot at which this price update was posted.

types.name: VerificationLevel
docs: Pyth price updates are bridged to all blockchains via Wormhole.
Using the price updates on another chain requires verifying the signatures of the Wormhole guardians.
The usual process is to check the signatures for two thirds of the total number of guardians, but this can be cumbersome on Solana because of the transaction size limits,
so we also allow for partial verification.
This enum represents how much a price update has been verified:
- If `Full`, we have verified the signatures for two thirds of the current guardians.
- If `Partial`, only `num_signatures` guardian signatures have been checked.
# Warning
Using partially verified price updates is dangerous, as it lowers the threshold of guardians that need to collude to produce a malicious price update.
